component.description: 2.25-MHz 600-mA Step Down Converter in 2 x 2 WSON and SOT Package

absolute_maximum_ratings.conditions: per JEDEC specification JESD22-C101, all pins

electrical_characteristics.conditions: IOUT = 0 mA, PFM mode enabled (MODE = GND) device not switching
IOUT = 0 mA, PFM mode enabled (MODE = GND) device switching, VOUT = 1.8 V
IOUT = 0 mA, switching with no load (MODE = VIN), PWM operation, VOUT = 1.8 V, VIN = 3 V

electrical_characteristics.parameter: High level input voltage, EN, MODE
Low level input voltage, EN, MODE
Forward current limit MOSFET high side and low side

electrical_characteristics.conditions: MODE = VIN, PWM operation, for fixed output voltage versions VFB = VOUT, 2.5 V ≤ VIN ≤ 6 V, 0 mA ≤ IOUT ≤ 600 mA
MODE = GND, device in PFM mode, voltage positioning active
Time from active EN to reach 95% of VOUT nominal
Time to ramp from 5% to 95% of VOUT
VIN = 3.6 V, VIN = VOUT = VSW, EN = GND

pin_definitions.description: This is the enable pin of the device. Pulling this pin to low forces the device into shutdown mode. Pulling this pin to high enables the device. This pin must be terminated. (SOT package)

Feedback pin for the internal regulation loop. Connect the external resistor divider to this pin. In case of fixed output voltage option, connect this pin directly to the output capacitor (SOT package)
This is the switch pin and is connected to the internal MOSFET switches. Connect the external inductor between this terminal and the output capacitor. (SOT package)
This is the switch pin and is connected to the internal MOSFET switches. Connect the external inductor between this terminal and the output capacitor. (WSON package)

This pin is only available at WSON package option. MODE pin = High forces the device to operate in fixed frequency PWM mode. MODE pin = Low enables the power save mode with automatic transition from PFM mode to fixed frequency PWM mode. (WSON package)

Feedback pin for the internal regulation loop. Connect the external resistor divider to this pin. In case of fixed output voltage option, connect this pin directly to the output capacitor (WSON package)
This is the enable pin of the device. Pulling this pin to low forces the device into shutdown mode. Pulling this pin to high enables the device. This pin must be terminated. (WSON package)

logical_pins.name: EN
logical_pins.description: Enable pin. Pulling this pin to low forces the device into shutdown mode. Pulling this pin to high enables the device. This pin must be terminated.

logical_pins.name: FB
logical_pins.description: Feedback pin for the internal regulation loop. Connect the external resistor divider to this pin. In case of fixed output voltage option, connect this pin directly to the output capacitor.

logical_pins.name: SW
logical_pins.description: Switch pin and is connected to the internal MOSFET switches. Connect the external inductor between this terminal and the output capacitor.

logical_pins.name: MODE
logical_pins.description: Mode selection pin. MODE pin = High forces the device to operate in fixed frequency PWM mode. MODE pin = Low enables the power save mode with automatic transition from PFM mode to fixed frequency PWM mode. Only available on WSON package.

logical_pins.name: Power PAD
logical_pins.description: Exposed thermal pad on WSON package. Typically connected to GND.

3.name: EN
3.description: Enable pin. Pulling this pin to low forces the device into shutdown mode. Pulling this pin to high enables the device. This pin must be terminated.

4.name: FB
4.description: Feedback pin for the internal regulation loop. Connect the external resistor divider to this pin. In case of fixed output voltage option, connect this pin directly to the output capacitor.

5.name: SW
5.description: Switch pin and is connected to the internal MOSFET switches. Connect the external inductor between this terminal and the output capacitor.

4.name: EN
4.description: Enable pin. Pulling this pin to low forces the device into shutdown mode. Pulling this pin to high enables the device. This pin must be terminated.

3.name: FB
3.description: Feedback pin for the internal regulation loop. Connect the external resistor divider to this pin. In case of fixed output voltage option, connect this pin directly to the output capacitor.

1.name: SW
1.description: Switch pin and is connected to the internal MOSFET switches. Connect the external inductor between this terminal and the output capacitor.

2.name: MODE
2.description: Mode selection pin. MODE pin = High forces the device to operate in fixed frequency PWM mode. MODE pin = Low enables the power save mode with automatic transition from PFM mode to fixed frequency PWM mode. Only available on WSON package.

EP.name: Power PAD
EP.description: Exposed thermal pad on WSON package. Typically connected to GND.
